title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO TEJERO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO BARRIO TEJEROS CONVENTION.

chunks.text:
H. No. 14375 / 62 OG No. 28, 4927 (July 11, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4348, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO TEJERO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO BARRIO TEJEROS CONVENTION.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Tejero in the Municipality of Rosario, Province of Cavite, is hereby changed to Barrio Tejeros Convention.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
